summary: Solid core logic in artifact-cleanup.ts, but workflow has critical issues: defines unused `dry_run` input (workflow_dispatch) never consumed by steps; script executes twice (lines ~26, 32—"Run script" then "Verify output"); fragile grep-based verification; test harness minimal (one case, loose assertions like `includes('SUMMARY_JSON')`); missing dependency clarity (run-tests.ts imports js-yaml without explicit install step); doesn't meet TDD/fixture-driven test spec ("set up temp git repo with fixture data"). Would not ship without: removing unused input, deduplicating script execution, adding structured output validation, expanding test coverage with fixture-based cases, declaring dependencies.
